llm_response:
Here are the answers to the Pauli operator multiplication questions:

(1) Input: $ (+i Y_{0}) (I) $
    Your Answer: +i Y_{0}

(2) Input: $ (X_{0}) (-i X_{0}) $
    Your Answer: -i I

(3) Input: $ (Y_{0}) (+i Y_{0}) $
    Your Answer: +i I

(4) Input: $ (-i I) (Y_{0}) $
    Your Answer: -i Y_{0}

(5) Input: $ (-i X_{0}) (I) $
    Your Answer: -i X_{0}

(6) Input: $ (+i I) (+i Z_{0}) $
    Your Answer: - Z_{0}

(7) Input: $ (Z_{0}) (- Z_{0}) $
    Your Answer: - I

(8) Input: $ (+i I) (+i Z_{0}) $
    Your Answer: - Z_{0}

(9) Input: $ (Y_{0}) (- Y_{0}) $
    Your Answer: - I

(10) Input: $ (Y_{0}) (-i Y_{0}) $
    Your Answer: -i I
